all.en: Email thread subject: Renewal terms for Southeast Asia distribution agreement
all.zh: 電郵主題：東南亞代理合約續約條款

all.en: From: Gregory Tan, Regional Director, dated April third
all.zh: 寄件人：區域總監 Gregory Tan，日期四月三日

all.en: Dear Mr. Halverson, I hope this message finds you well
all.zh: 親愛的 Halverson 先生，希望您一切安好

all.en: Our current distribution agreement expires on June thirtieth this year
all.zh: 我方現行代理合約於今年六月三十日到期

all.en: I would like to formally initiate discussions for the next three-year term
all.zh: 我想正式啟動下一個三年期合約之討論

all.en: Over the past term, we have grown regional revenue by sixty-eight percent
all.zh: 過去合約期間我方將區域營收成長百分之六十八

all.en: We expanded retail coverage from four hundred to nine hundred outlets
all.zh: 我們將零售覆蓋從四百家擴大到九百家門市

all.en: Our marketing investment over the period exceeded two million dollars
all.zh: 本期行銷投資已超過兩百萬美元

all.en: Given this track record, we propose enhanced terms for the new period
all.zh: 鑒於此佳績，我方提出新期間之優化條款

all.en: We request exclusive distribution rights extended to Vietnam and Cambodia
all.zh: 我方要求將獨家代理權延伸至越南與柬埔寨

all.en: Additionally, we propose volume rebates restructured to a sliding scale
all.zh: 此外建議將數量回饋調整為階梯式結構

all.en: Looking forward to your reply, Gregory Tan
all.zh: 期待您的回覆，Gregory Tan 敬上

all.en: Reply from: Erik Halverson, VP International Sales, April seventh
all.zh: 回覆：國際業務副總 Erik Halverson，四月七日

all.en: Dear Gregory, thank you for the comprehensive opening message
all.zh: 親愛的 Gregory，感謝您完整的開場信件

all.en: We deeply value our partnership and the results you've delivered
all.zh: 我方深深重視這份夥伴關係與您所交付的成果

all.en: Before responding in detail, I'd like to clarify two points
all.zh: 在詳細回覆前我想釐清兩點

all.en: Could you share your projected volume forecast for the new three-year term
all.zh: 可否分享新三年合約期的預估銷量

all.en: Also, are you prepared to commit to a minimum marketing spend annually
all.zh: 另外，您是否願意承諾每年最低行銷支出

all.en: On exclusivity in Vietnam and Cambodia, we need to discuss further
all.zh: 關於越南與柬埔寨的獨家權，我們需進一步討論

all.en: Two competing distributors have approached us about those territories
all.zh: 已有兩家競爭代理商針對該區域與我方接洽

all.en: We believe healthy competition has historically lifted overall performance
all.zh: 我方相信良性競爭一向能提升整體表現

all.en: Looking forward to your detailed response, best regards, Erik
all.zh: 期待您的詳細回覆，致上問候，Erik

all.en: Reply from: Gregory Tan, April tenth, with attached spreadsheet
all.zh: 回覆：Gregory Tan，四月十日，附試算表

all.en: Erik, thank you for the prompt and thoughtful reply
all.zh: Erik，感謝您迅速且周到的回覆

all.en: Please find attached our three-year volume projection by SKU
all.zh: 請見附件三年期各料號銷量預估

all.en: Year one targets seventeen million dollars in net wholesale revenue
all.zh: 第一年目標為一千七百萬美元淨批發營收

all.en: Year two scales to twenty-one million, year three to twenty-six million
all.zh: 第二年成長至兩千一百萬，第三年達兩千六百萬

all.en: We commit to an annual marketing spend floor of one million dollars
all.zh: 我方承諾每年行銷支出底限為一百萬美元

all.en: That figure is double our current contractual minimum obligation
all.zh: 該數字為我方現行合約最低義務的兩倍

all.en: Regarding Vietnam and Cambodia, we strongly believe in exclusivity
all.zh: 關於越南與柬埔寨，我方堅信獨家代理之必要

all.en: Dual distribution typically erodes margins and creates channel conflict
all.zh: 雙重代理通常侵蝕毛利並造成通路衝突

all.en: However, we are open to performance-based exclusivity with annual reviews
all.zh: 不過我方接受績效導向獨家權，並每年檢視

all.en: If we miss agreed thresholds, you may invite a second distributor
all.zh: 若未達約定門檻，您方可引入第二家代理商

all.en: Sincerely yours, Gregory
all.zh: 誠摯地，Gregory 敬上

all.en: Reply from: Erik Halverson, April fourteenth
all.zh: 回覆：Erik Halverson，四月十四日

all.en: Gregory, the volume forecast looks ambitious but achievable
all.zh: Gregory，銷量預估看來積極但可達成

all.en: The marketing commitment is a meaningful step forward and we appreciate it
all.zh: 行銷承諾是有意義的進步，我方深表感謝

all.en: I have circulated your proposal internally with our finance team
all.zh: 我已將您的提案於內部與財務團隊傳閱

all.en: We can accept performance-based exclusivity in Vietnam initially
all.zh: 我方初步接受越南的績效導向獨家權

all.en: Cambodia, however, must remain non-exclusive for the first eighteen months
all.zh: 然而柬埔寨於前十八個月須維持非獨家

all.en: The market is still developing and we want flexibility there
all.zh: 該市場仍在發展，我方需要保留彈性

all.en: On the rebate structure, please share specific tier thresholds
all.zh: 關於回饋結構，請分享具體層級門檻

all.en: We will review and propose counter-thresholds if needed
all.zh: 我方將檢視並視需要提出對案門檻

all.en: Best regards, Erik
all.zh: 致上問候，Erik

all.en: Reply from: Gregory Tan, April seventeenth
all.zh: 回覆：Gregory Tan，四月十七日

all.en: Erik, we appreciate the constructive direction of this discussion
all.zh: Erik，我方感激本次討論的建設性方向

all.en: We can accept Cambodia non-exclusive for the eighteen-month period
all.zh: 我方接受柬埔寨十八個月非獨家

all.en: Conditional on a right of first refusal if you appoint a second partner
all.zh: 條件為若您方任命第二夥伴，我方享有優先承購權

all.en: Proposed rebate tiers are five percent at fifteen million annual purchases
all.zh: 建議回饋層級為年採購一千五百萬美元時百分之五

all.en: Seven percent at twenty million, and nine percent at twenty-five million
all.zh: 兩千萬時百分之七，兩千五百萬時百分之九

all.en: Rebates calculated quarterly and paid net thirty after each quarter
all.zh: 回饋按季計算，季末後三十天淨付款

all.en: Looking forward to your response, kind regards, Gregory
all.zh: 期待您的回覆，謹致問候，Gregory

all.en: Reply from: Erik Halverson, April twenty-first
all.zh: 回覆：Erik Halverson，四月二十一日

all.en: Gregory, we accept the right of first refusal clause for Cambodia
all.zh: Gregory，我方接受柬埔寨之優先承購權條款

all.en: Warm regards, Erik
all.zh: 致上溫暖問候，Erik
